nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: NT
nodes.summary: NT表示 IUCN 近危等级，当前关联914种鸟类，如帝企鹅、小斑几维鸟、大美洲鸵等914种鸟类。

nodes.name: Oxapampa antpitta
nodes.summary: Oxapampa antpitta（Oxapampa antpitta，学名 Grallaria centralis），在图谱中标记为近危（NT）物种，主要分布于次生林，常见栖息地包括山地森林，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏。

nodes.name: 次生林
nodes.summary: 次生林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联749种鸟类，包括孤䳍、Sickle-winged guan、黑額鳴冠雉等749种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 山地森林
nodes.summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: That species inhabits the understory of humid montane forest and secondary forest where it favors stands of bamboo and other dense undergrowth

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: That species inhabits the understory of humid montane forest and secondary forest where it favors stands of bamboo and other dense undergrowth

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: The IUCN follows HBW taxonomy and so has not assessed the Oxapampa antpitta separately from the chestnut antpitta. "Considering that the geographic range of the present species is even smaller than that considered for the Chestnut Antpitta (sensu lato), and in the face of suspected population declines due to ongoing habitat loss for most birds in that region...the Oxapampa Antpitta undoubtedly deserves a rating of Near Threatened or higher."
